title: Simply Combat
body:
![Logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/q1XnxJts/images/21c18cb640d4074c54dba33b41594e4fceff68b3.png)
Features - Low fire - Low shield - No pumpkin overlay - Simpler armor style - - - ![Armor](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/q1XnxJts/images/eec8bcd7dd80e5bba09b4d17d2a1f54f712feafb.png) - - - - Simpler end crystal texture - No explosion particles - No spyglass overlay - No fishing bobber - Reimagined tool style - - - ![Tools](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/q1XnxJts/images/46590dd6d7eb0dc3f434172c1c3426219f4f7b22.png) - - -

## Contribute Feel like something is missing?\ You can chat with me on discord and help me improve the pack!
